Client Stories

What Our Clients Say

Compound Gate · Lagos
⚠ The Problem

Our gate was rusted and bent — a safety risk anyone could push open.

✦ What Zuwa Did

Came within 24 hours, fabricated a premium black & gold medallion gate, installed in one day.

“My neighbours thought we renovated the whole house. The quality is absolutely world class.”

CO
Chukwuemeka Obi
Lekki, Lagos
Burglar Proof · Abuja
⚠ The Problem

After a break-in attempt, my family could not sleep. Weak bars bent under pressure.

✦ What Zuwa Did

Heavy-gauge scroll bars across all 8 windows, welded solid into the frame. Beautiful finish.

“My house looks even better now. Most importantly, my family sleeps soundly again.”

AN
Adaeze Nwosu
Gwarinpa, Abuja
Railing · Port Harcourt
⚠ The Problem

New duplex, no staircase railing. Young children in house. Another fabricator vanished for 3 weeks.

✦ What Zuwa Did

Came next morning, showed designs, promised 7 days — delivered in 5. Spotless installation.

“Zuwa Steel turned a safety hazard into the most admired feature in my entire home.”

BA
Babatunde Adeola
GRA, Port Harcourt
